text: "Hi, my name is Megan, and I'm with AutoCAD." "You don't know what we're seeing in your area, you're overpaying for your auto insurance." "And if you want me to find a better rate, you just make sure we're finding you the right quote." "Ma'am, are you under the age of 80?" "Sorry, I didn't touch that." "You just make a firm rate check, are you under the age of 80?" (buzzing)
